changes.old: I shall find tyrants to combat and good causes to defend everywhere.
changes.new: I shall find bullies to combat and good causes to defend everywhere.
changes.reason: Restores Gemini's 'bullies'; prepotenti = the overbearing/bullies, not tyrants (tiranni/despoti), preserving the deliberate contrast with 'despots' used two sentences earlier.
changes.context_sentence: the world are brothers. I shall find bullies to combat and good causes to defend everywhere.”  From this I concluded
